ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the content */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, video, image) */,
  "source_platform" TEXT /* Platform from which the content was scraped */,
  "img_src" TEXT /* URL source of the content image */,
  "bullet_color" TEXT /* Color of the bullet point associated with the content */,
  "bullet_color_hex" TEXT /* Hexadecimal color code of the bullet point */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the content */,
  "scrape_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was scraped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the content */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the metadata belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keywords related to the content */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL source of the content */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the content, if different from the main content table */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_metadata_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
